questions.question: Let f(x) = 2x and g(x) = x + 1. Find (g ∘ f)(-2).
questions.hint: Use the definition of function composition

questions.question: If f(x) is the inverse of g(x) = |x - 2|, what is f(-3)?
questions.hint: Use the definition of inverse functions

questions.question: Solve for h(x) in the equation f(f(f(x))) = x, where f(x) = 3x + 1.
questions.hint: Use the definition of function composition
